---
title: "Behavioral Game Theory"
description: "Bounded rationality, QRE, level-k, social preferences, learning models."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="behavioral-gt"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Behavioral Game Theory

Bounded rationality, QRE, level-k, social preferences, learning models.
